system.description: You can overcome danger through sheer brawn and grit. Any time you are In Jeopardy!, you can roll +Tough.

failure.value: You are still In Jeopardy!, but it is somehow just a little worse. The Director will tell you how.

partial.value: Unmark In Jeopardy!, but lose any Edges you have.

success.value: Unmark In Jeopardy! and gain an Edge.

critical.value: Unmark In Jeopardy! and clear your lowest severity Condition. If you have no Conditions, gain an Edge.
